title: 6 Logging in to MTS for MTS Administrators
body_text:
6	Logging in to MTS for MTS Administrators
6.1	Overview of Logging in to MTS for MTS Administrators
Use the Money Transfer System (MTS) to manage Wires User permissions, MTS Administrators, and branch information for the Wires application. MTS users require a 2-Step security token to access MTS via the Client Centre.
To access MTS, note the following:
The individual must be set up as a User Management Security Officer or a Client Centre User and assigned access to the MTS application. See the User Management Part for procedures on creating User Management Security Officers and Client Centre Users and assigning them access to applications.
The individual must have a username set up in MTS as an MTS Administrator. See Section 7.5, Creating an MTS Administrator.
6.2	Logging in to MTS
To log in to MTS:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select Sign in. See Figure 1.
Note: 	Youâll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itâs your first login to the Client Centre, youâve deleted your cookies, or youâre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
.
See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
MTS (Money Transfer System)
.
See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youâve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under âMy Favouritesâ.
Figure 3: Accessing MTS (Money Transfer System)
Enter the code thatâs generated on your registered 2-step security token, then select
Done
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Entering the Code from the 2-Step Security Token
The MTS main menu displays if youâre successfully authenticated.
Important
:	Always log off the Client Centre and close the browser when you step away from your desk or when youâre finished using the system.
END
